segments.text: In you, O LORD, I have taken refuge; let me never be put to shame; deliver me in your righteousness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Incline your ear to me; rescue me speedily! Be to me a rock of refuge, a strong fortress to save me.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: my…: Heb. to me for a rock of strength

segments.text: For you are my rock and my fortress; and for your name's sake you lead me and guide me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You will take me out of the net they have hidden for me, for you are my refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Into your hand I commit my spirit; you have redeemed me, O LORD, faithful God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I hate those who pay regard to worthless idols, but I trust in the LORD.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will rejoice and be glad in your steadfast love, because you have seen my affliction; you have known the distress of my soul.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have not delivered me into the hand of the enemy; you have set my feet in a broad place.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Be gracious to me, O LORD, for I am in distress; my eye is wasted from grief; my soul and my body also.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For my life is spent with sorrow, and my years with sighing; my strength fails because of my iniquity, and my bones waste away.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Because of all my adversaries I have become a reproach, especially to my neighbors, and an object of dread to my acquaintances; those who see me in the street flee from me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have been forgotten like one who is dead; I have become like a broken vessel.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: a broken…: Heb. a vessel that perisheth

segments.text: For I hear the whispering of many—terror on every side!—as they scheme together against me, as they plot to take my life.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I trust in you, O LORD; I say, 'You are my God.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My times are in your hand; rescue me from the hand of my enemies and from my persecutors!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Make your face shine on your servant; save me in your steadfast love!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O LORD, let me not be put to shame, for I call upon you; let the wicked be put to shame; let them be silent in Sheol.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let the lying lips be mute, which speak insolently against the righteous with pride and contempt.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Oh, how abundant is your goodness, which you have stored up for those who fear you and worked for those who take refuge in you, in the sight of the children of mankind!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In the cover of your presence you hide them from the plots of men; you store them in your shelter from the strife of tongues.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Blessed be the LORD, for he has wondrously shown his steadfast love to me when I was in a besieged city.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I had said in my alarm, 'I am cut off from your sight.' But you heard the voice of my pleas when I cried to you for help.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Love the LORD, all you his saints! The LORD preserves the faithful but abundantly repays the one who acts in pride.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all you who wait for the LORD!
segments.speaker: David
